data.title: Allegion CEO to speak at 2026 Barclays Industrial Select Conference on Feb. 19 at Loews Miami Beach Hotel.
data.description: Allegion plc President and CEO, John H. Stone, is set to present the company's long-term strategy at the 2026 Barclays Industrial Select Conference on Feb. 19. The conference will take place at Loews Miami Beach Hotel. A live listen-only webcast can be accessed through Allegion’s investor website at investor.allegion.com. Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) specializes in creating cutting-edge security and access solutions.

data.title: EverCommerce to announce Q4 2025 financial results on March 12, 2026, after US markets close. NASDAQ: EVCM.
data.description: EverCommerce Inc., a prominent provider of SaaS solutions for service SMBs, is set to announce its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, March 12, 2026, after the U.S. financial markets shut down. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EVCM. This update was shared from Denver on Feb. 12, 2026.

data.title: Vitalist discloses Q3 2026 financial results.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion tons in 2021, marking a 6% increase compared to the previous year. This surge in emissions is attributed to the rebound in economic activities post-pandemic. The report also indicates that China remains the world's largest emitter, accounting for 30% of the total emissions, followed by the United States with 14% and India with 7%. The data highlights the urgent need for enhanced climate action to curb the rising emissions and combat the looming threat of climate change.

data.title: RF Acquisition Corp III prices $100 million IPO of 10,000,000 units at $10.00 each, to list on Nasdaq as RFAMU on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: Singapore, February 12, 2026 - RF Acquisition Corp III disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering, consisting of 10,000,000 units sold at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be available for trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "RFAMU" starting from February 13, 2026. Each unit comprises one ordinary share valued at $0.0001 per share, and one right to receive one-tenth of an ordinary share post the Company's successful execution of an initial business combination, with likely adjustments. Post commencing separate trading, the ordinary shares and rights will potentially be listed on Nasdaq with the symbols "RFAM" and "RFAMR" respectively. The offering period is scheduled to conclude by February 17, 2026, adhering to the usual closing conditions.

data.description: On February 12, 2026, StorageVault Canada Inc. (SVI-TSX) released its audited results for the full year of 2025 in Toronto. Iqbal Khan, the Chief Financial Officer, provided comments on the Corporation's performance.

data.title: Parker Hannifin to present at Citi’s 2026 Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on Feb 19 at 11:20 am ET in Miami, Florida.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Parker Hannifin Corporation, a prominent player in motion and control technologies, revealed its forthcoming participation in Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference in Miami, Florida. The event is set to take place on February 19, 2026, at 11:20 a.m. Eastern time. Those interested can tune in to a live webcast of the presentation on Parker's investor information web page, investors.parker.com. The webcast will also be available for later viewing on the same platform.

data.title: Financial Institutions, Inc. raises quarterly stock dividend by 3.2% to $0.32, achieving 3.7% yield and 35% payout ratio.
data.description: Financial Institutions, Inc. has approved a 3.2% increase in their quarterly common stock dividend to $0.32. This new dividend represents a 3.7% yield and a 35% payout ratio for the company.

data.title: Decibel, incubated in Aptos, is set to unveil a stablecoin, USDCBL, pegged to the dollar for onchain perps, generating yield from reserves.
data.description: A new digital token called USDCBL, pegged to the value of the US dollar, is set to be used as collateral for on-chain perpetual contracts. The protocol will retain cash and Treasury reserves to generate yield, providing stability and security to the system.

data.title: Restaurant Brands Intl (NYSE: QSR) beats Q4 earnings estimates by 2.13%, reports EPS of $0.96. Revenue up $170M YoY.
data.description: On Thursday, February 12, 2026, Restaurant Brands Intl (QSR) released its Q4 earnings at 06:30 AM. The company surpassed anticipated earnings, with an EPS of $0.96 compared to the estimated $0.94, reflecting a 2.13% increase. Additionally, revenue rose by $170.00 million from the previous year's corresponding period. In the previous quarter, the company also outperformed expectations. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Callaway Golf Co. sells Jack Wolfskin, 60% of Topgolf, now in net cash position of $680M. Exceeds Q4 & FY 2025 expectations, with 2026 revenue guidance of $1.98-2.05B and Adjusted EBITDA of $170-195M. Segment results show declines but better than expected. Plans to pay off $258M convertible notes. Maintaining zero net leverage position in 2026. Conference call held to discuss financial results and outlook. Provides non-GAAP financial information.
data.description: Callaway Golf Company has returned to its roots as a golf equipment-focused company, selling off non-golf assets and significantly improving its financial position. After selling Jack Wolfskin and a 60% stake in Topgolf, the company is now in a net cash position with $680 million cash and $480 million in debt. Q4 and Full Year 2025 showed strong results with higher than expected Net Revenue and Adjusted EBITDA. For 2026, the company expects revenue between $1.98B to $2.05B and Adjusted EBITDA of $170M to $195M. Fourth-quarter net sales were $367.5 million, down 1% primarily due to fewer product launches, offset by soft goods segment gains. Adjusted EBITDA was negative $25.1 million. Full-year net sales were $2,060.1 million, with a decrease in the Soft Goods segment. Adjusted EBITDA for the year was $222.4 million. Ongoing efforts include debt repayment, a share repurchase program, and plans to focus on margin expansion and free cash flow. The company plans to pay off its remaining debt and maintain a net cash position. In the first quarter of 2026, Callaway Golf expects consolidated net sales of $635 to $665 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $110 to $125 million. Their strategy includes providing non-GAAP financial information, such as constant currency basis, non-recurring expenses, and Adjusted EBITDA, to supplement their GAAP results. Management believes these metrics give a better understanding of the company's financial performance. For more details and access to further company information, you can visit Callaway Golf Company’s official investor relations website.

data.title: Carriage Services to release 2025 annual results on Feb 25 after market closes, with a conference call on Feb 26 at 8:00 a.m. CT.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) revealed intentions to unveil its 2025 annual results on February 25, 2026, post-market closure. The company will host a conference call on February 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time, broadcasted live via webcast. This event marks a significant step in transparency for the company as they aim to provide stakeholders with key financial insights. Don't forget to tune in to the webcast for a comprehensive overview of Carriage Services' performance.

data.title: Airbnb and Expedia beat earnings expectations. Only one stock rises, the other sinks.
data.description: On Thursday, Airbnb and Expedia announced their financial results, surpassing analysts' predictions. However, only one of the companies witnessed a rise in its stock value following the report. Airbnb and Expedia both reported strong earnings, with Airbnb's stock climbing while Expedia's stock declined. This news was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily, discussing the contrasting market reactions between the two companies.

data.description: Roku, a leading streaming video platform, exceeded Wall Street's expectations for earnings in the fourth quarter. The company's stock surged in response to the news. The post about Roku's strong fourth-quarter performance was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) to hold Q4 2025 conference call on Feb 20 at 10:00 am CT. Results out Feb 19 after market close.
data.description: In Houston, Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX), a prominent company offering diverse contracting services, such as heating, ventilation, air conditioning, plumbing, electrical work, piping, and controls, has set its quarterly conference call and webcast for Friday, February 20, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. The purpose of this session is to review the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Specific figures and insights will be disclosed post-market closure on Thursday, February 19.
